title: CVE-2018-8340 — CVSS 6.5 (MEDIUM)
content:
# CVE-2018-8340

CVSS Score: 6.5 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2018-08-15T17:29:03.907
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

A security feature bypass vulnerability exists when Active Directory Federation Services (AD FS) improperly handles multi-factor authentication requests, aka "AD FS Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability." This affects Windows Server 2016, Windows Server 2012 R2, Windows 10 Servers.

References: http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/105029, http://www.securitytracker.com/id/1041474, https://portal.msrc.microsoft.com/en-US/security-guidance/advisory/CVE-2018-8340
